query:
SELECT 
  emissorNome,
  codigoCetip,
  indexador,
  incentivado,
  CAST(taxaIndicativa AS DECIMAL(10,4)) as taxa,
  CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,4)) as zspread,
  CAST(durationAnos AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as duration,
  ntnbReferencia,
  rating
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE zspread IS NOT NULL
  AND indexador LIKE '%IPCA%'
  AND taxaIndicativa IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY incentivado DESC, zspread DESC
LIMIT 10;
